chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1403 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.09.2020 Mr. Pervez Tarique Tagar, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh *** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that vide order dated 02.05.2013 respondent No.2 had approved Nali from Government Pai but the same is not being implemented by the respondents. He further submits that he would be satisfied and will not press this petition, if directions may be issued to respondent No.2 to implement its above referred order. In view of above, this petition is dismissed as not pressed, with directions to official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
